name: AI conversational interview conductor
description: Claude AI conducts a structured multi-question interview on a given topic, collects and evaluates responses, generates follow-up questions, and saves the full interview transcript with analysis to Google Sheets. Adapted from n8n's conversational interview with AI agents workflow.

source.originalName: Conversational interviews with AI agents and n8n forms

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving interview data

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to save interview results

sheetName.description: Sheet tab name for interview data

interviewTopic.description: The topic or role for the interview (e.g., 'Senior Software Engineer', 'Product Manager candidate')

intervieweeName.description: Name of the person being interviewed

numberOfQuestions.description: Number of interview questions to generate (default: 5)

intervieweeResponses.description: The interviewee's responses to be evaluated, or 'generate-sample' for demo mode

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for interview generation
Build Google Sheets rows from interview data
Save interview data to Google Sheets
